Identification.LongTitle: An Act respecting Christian Heritage Month

Provision.Text: This enactment designates the month of December as âChristian Heritage Monthâ.
Whereas the month of December marks significant events and celebrations in the Christian calendar, from the beginning of Advent to the celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ;
Whereas Christianity has profoundly influenced the principles of compassion, justice and service upon which Canada is founded;
Whereas Canadaâs Christian community has made significant contributions to the growth and prosperity of Canada throughout its history;
And whereas it is essential to honour and celebrate the diverse expressions of faith that continue to enrich our communities;
Now, therefore, His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Christian Heritage Month Act.
Throughout Canada, in each year and every year, the month of December is to be known as âChristian Heritage Monthâ.
